prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game sprite source for chroma-key extraction
Primary request: Create a single detailed N700S-inspired Shinkansen train asset for an isometric early-2000s Japanese transport simulator.
Subject: full train consist, glossy white body, thin blue stripe, dark windows, accurate long aerodynamic nose, visible roof panels, pantographs, articulated car seams, subtle pixel highlights. No logos.
Style/medium: crisp 2D isometric pixel-art / A-Train / late-1990s Japanese railway sim style, dense readable sprite detail, not low-poly, not photorealistic.
Composition/framing: one complete train only, three-quarter isometric angle matching an isometric map, oriented left-to-right, generous padding, no track, no station, no text.
Background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background, no shadow on background, no gradient, no texture.
Constraints: no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no checkerboard, no cropped train, no duplicated trains; subject must be fully separated from magenta background and must not contain #ff00ff.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game sprite kit source for chroma-key extraction
Primary request: Create an isometric Shinkansen station platform kit for a retro Japanese railway simulator.
Subject: platform island, canopy roof, ticket concourse block, stairs/escalator hints, overhead catenary posts, platform lights, clean concrete, teal glass accents, no readable signs.
Style/medium: crisp 2D isometric pixel-art / early-2000s transport sim, detailed but modular, cohesive with A-Train/SimCity reference.
Composition/framing: a compact group of station sprites, not a full scene, no trains, generous padding.
Background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background, no shadow on background, no gradient, no texture.
Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no checkerboard; subject separated from magenta background and no #ff00ff in subject.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game sprite kit source for chroma-key extraction
Primary request: Create an isometric Shinkansen rail infrastructure kit for a retro Japanese railway simulator.
Subject: straight elevated rail segment, gentle curve segment, switch/turnout, viaduct pillars, catenary gantry, ballast/track bed, clean rails, maintenance walkway.
Style/medium: crisp 2D isometric pixel-art / early-2000s transport sim, polished sprite sheet feel, detailed but readable.
Composition/framing: several separated modular rail pieces on one sheet, no trains, no text, generous padding.
Background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background, no shadow on background, no gradient, no texture.
Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no checkerboard; pieces separated from magenta background and no #ff00ff in subject.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: visual reference sheet for game HUD redesign
Primary request: Create a polished early-2000s Japanese railway operations simulator HUD kit for ASMR Shinkansen.
Subject: dark glassy operations panels, timetable rows, train inspector card, route timeline, mini map frame, small buttons, pause/play controls, soft amber/blue/green accents.
Style/medium: crisp pixel-art / transport-management game UI, like dense A-Train / SimCity operations interface, readable, professional, not SaaS dashboard.
Composition/framing: reference sheet of UI components, no final app screenshot, no brand logos.
Text: use only tiny illegible placeholder glyphs, no readable words.
Constraints: no copyrighted logos, no watermark, no large title, no photorealism.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: detailed station yard art plate for close zoom / inspector use
Primary request: Create a polished isometric pixel-art Tokyo Station Shinkansen yard scene in the target reference style.
Subject: many parallel tracks, arched platform roofs, white-blue Shinkansen trains, catenary gantries, nearby dense city blocks, small roads, tiny passengers, trees, warm platform lights.
Style/medium: crisp 2D isometric pixel-art, late-1990s/early-2000s Japanese railway management simulator, extremely detailed but readable, cohesive authored game scene.
Composition/framing: 16:9 wide scene, rail yard diagonally through center, no UI, no labels, no readable text.
Constraints: no logos, no watermark, no checkerboard, no cropped trains, no floating cutouts; one coherent scene.
